caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, textured wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with tan suspenders and a red and tan bow tie. He is positioned in front of a black microphone. Behind him is a wall featuring framed photographs and a display of clothing, including a "LEE" brand item. To his left, a logo reads "GOSS TALK JOY" with "PODCAST" below it. Another logo on the left side of the frame reads "ESTALID" above "PODCAST." As the scene progresses, the man remains seated, subtly shifting his head and facial expression while looking toward someone off-camera. The background elements, including the framed photos, the clothing displays, and the on-screen text, remain static throughout the sequence.
